summary: FQ-07 visual asset pipeline with color fallback: data/visual_assets.json + the art/generated/<category>/<id>.png convention drive image-first rendering, with the existing generated colors/shapes as the permanent fallback. BlockRegistry.visual_texture loads via Image.load_from_file (no editor import pass; misses cached; clear_visual_cache). Render sites: block tileset textures (nearest-neighbor resized; collision/occlusion untouched), enemy sprites (damage as a subtractive red tint — review fix, overbright modulate clamps invisible), and a 5-slot hotbar item icon strip hidden without art. art/source_templates/ASSET_TEMPLATE.md documents naming, per-category sizes and resize behavior, local Ollama prompt notes (outside game and validation), the export-build caveat, and a review checklist. Validator fails broken explicit references and reports convention gaps as INFO only. Smoke writes/deletes gitignored smoke_tmp_* art through the explicit-override path proving image-wins and fallback-returns pixel-for-pixel. Review: no must-fix; 3 should-fix + 3 nits applied. Smoke 169 -> 173.
scope: FQ-07 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit 717a5a5 plus this evidence-only packet commit; pushed to origin/main.
next_action: FQ-08: block and enemy damage visuals.
